analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.hetzner.com covered 962 pages with 100% crawl coverage across 1,014 requested URLs. The site contains 13 confirmed broken internal documentation links and 20 unverified links excluded from counts due to authentication or rate-limiting. API reference coverage stands at 52.69% across 56 detected API pages. SEO/geo metadata issues affect 45.95% of pages, while example code reliability is estimated at 89.29% and freshness metadata coverage reaches 91.58%. Overall audit confidence is 67.26%, with link verification confidence notably low at 34.39%.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100% (962 of 962 discoverable pages)
High freshness metadata coverage at 91.58% of pages
Strong example code reliability estimate of 89.29%
API page detection successful with 56 pages identified
risks: 13 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrading user navigation
20 unverified links create uncertainty in link health assessment (34.39% link confidence)
SEO/geo metadata issues on 45.95% of pages may impact discoverability and localization
API reference coverage at 52.69% leaves nearly half of API surface undocumented
Overall audit confidence of 67.26% indicates moderate reliability limitations
Low link verification confidence (34.39%) suggests potential hidden link rot
3 excluded links may hide additional broken link issues

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 13 confirmed broken internal documentation links
Investigate and resolve 20 unverified links blocked by auth/rate-limits to confirm link health
Expand API reference documentation to cover remaining 47.31% of API surface (target 100%)
Remediate SEO/geo metadata issues affecting 45.95% of pages to improve search visibility
Review and update the 8.42% of pages missing freshness metadata

limitations: External audit cannot verify links behind authentication, rate-limits, or server blocks (20 URLs unverified, 34.39% link confidence)
API coverage detection relies on pattern matching and may not capture all API documentation formats or custom implementations
Example code reliability is estimated through static analysis and cannot guarantee runtime correctness or environment-specific execution
SEO/geo issue detection is based on metadata presence and structure, not actual search engine ranking or geo-targeting effectiveness
Audit cannot assess documentation accuracy, completeness of content, or alignment with actual product functionality
